lighting: diffuse milky front light with a faint amber glow gathered at the center of the bloom; edges fall into soft charcoal side shadow
object_inventory: one dominant translucent paper flower opened like a stage curtain
two secondary forms: a low sunset rail-line threshold and a thin sequencer ribbon
vertical copper text columns pressed into the paper field
tiny hidden glyph cuts and pinholes
small photographic apertures embedded along the margins
quiet source-anchor marks disguised as labels, slits, stains, and thumbnail windows
negative_constraints: no desks, dashboards, browser chrome, cards, shelves, cabinets, archives, or software UI
no crowded collage or equal-weight source grid
no literal code editor, terminal, phone, laptop, or office environment
no repeated logos or reproduced page layouts
preserve at least 45 percent open negative space
limit the main image to one dominant form and two secondary forms
no equal-weight grid of source objects
